text_block_list.name: Children's Center Staff
text_block_list.text:
Both of you, go ahead and eat up! Don't worry
about assisting!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'd prefer to do something to help...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, on our way back from a day out, we're
approached by some familiar children.

text_block_list.name: Cheerful Girl
text_block_list.text:
I knew it was you! You're the heroes who helped
out Doto!
choice_data_list:
Oh, it's the kids from when we were searching
for the legendary blade.

text_block_list.name: Children's Center Parent A
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes! I heard that you helped Opera O prepare
for her performance!

text_block_list.name: Children's Center Parent B
text_block_list.text:
The kids seemed so excited saying they couldn't
wait to see it. Why don't you join us for a
barbecue?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No, that's all right. We didn't do anything special.

text_block_list.name: Cheeky-Faced Boy
text_block_list.text:
Pleeease! Just for a little while! Come on, this
way!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: H-hold on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite seeming quite hesitant, Admire Vega
joins in with the barbecue.

text_block_list.name: Children's Center Staff B
text_block_list.text:
Hm? We've already run out of ingredients? I'll
have to go and pick up a few more things.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Uh... In that case, I'll go.

text_block_list.name: Children's Center Staff B
text_block_list.text:
No, you sit down! You're our guest, and we need
to get quite a lot!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah. We can handle it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: This should be everything. I hope so, anyway...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've got a lot of boxes. Even if they aren't too
heavy to lift, there's no way we can keep them
balanced on the way back.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I don't know how this is going to work. But I said
I'd do it, so...

Hey, Ayabe! That's a ton of groceries you've got
there!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
This is where you're heading with those boxes,
right? Let's load them onto my cart!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Thank you. That... would be a big help.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
No worries! You're in luck—I was planning to buy
a lot today!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(But obviously she meant to use the cart for
herself. I'm making her go really far out of the
way...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(We're costing her a lot of time and effort. It
wouldn't be enough to only give her a "thank
you.")

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I should start heading back! Have fun,
guys!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? W-wait up!

text_block_list.name: Children's Center Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Yes, we can't have you go just like that. Let us
treat you to a meal for helping us carry
everything! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? In that case... thank you so much!
I'll gladly join you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! This makes me really happy!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Happy...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I don't need it. Your words are thanks enough.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but! I couldn't... How about something besides
a drink? An ice cream, or a grilled carrot? Or
maybe...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (I see...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Top Road... I'll do the cooking. You take a seat.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.
choice_data_list:
What's up? It looks like something's on your
mind.

What's up? It looks like something's on your
mind.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I think I kind of understand how Doto felt before.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes you want to do something more than
just saying thank you.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
There are feelings that can't be expressed
through words alone.
choice_data_list:
In that case, you have to do a good job with the
cooking!

In that case, you have to do a good job with the
cooking!
We really learned a lot today.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
There are feelings that can't be expressed
through words alone.
choice_data_list:
In that case, you have to do a good job with the
cooking!

In that case, you have to do a good job with the
cooking!
We really learned a lot today.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That goes for you too. Make sure not to burn
anything.

text_block_list.name: Children's Center Staff
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh! Thanks so much, you two! You did a
great job grilling the meat!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Saying it out loud feels a bit embarrassing,
though...
choice_data_list: Come on, you don't have be like that!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Don't start. Just be quiet and eat your food.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega piles vegetables and meat onto my
plate in rapid succession, not allowing me a
moment to speak.
